C. c. Mitchell, contracting freight
agent for the o. r. e N. has re-
signed to accept a similar situation
with the Inland Empire road.


The Chicago, Milwaukee & st.
Paul Railway company of Idaho
was recently Incorporated with ST..
100000 capital stock.


The Northern Mercantile com.
pany of Standpoint has purchased
the business Of the Newport Trad
ing company for $4,000.


Bishop O'Dea celebrated impos
ing services at st. Alousius church
early yesterday when he ordained
to priesthood six students of Con
zaga college.


Loca freight agents have been
informed of the postponement OF
the meeting Of THE Transconti
mental association which was tc
have met in Chicago June 4.


The records for May in the issu
ance of marriage licenses were
broken last month, when 121 ii
censes were issued at the county
auditors office.
